summary: Full UI testing of redesigned game board and related pages. All 11 features verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All redesign features verified: 2x3 grid, 300/600/900 buttons, warm beige/olive bg, real images, pricing 29.99 SAR, admin shows 300/600/900, no old tagline on homepage. Full flow: setup->categories(6 locked)->game board->question page all working.
